executable.cmd: ros2 launch gazebo_ros gazebo.launch.py world:=$(var world_file)
executable.name: gazebo

executable.cmd: sleep 1 && ros2 run gazebo_ros spawn_entity.py -topic robot_description -entity rover -x 0.0 -y 0.0 -z 0.25 -Y 0.0
executable.name: spawn_entity

executable.cmd: sleep 2 && ros2 run controller_manager spawner joint_state_broadcaster
executable.name: jsb_spawner

executable.cmd: sleep 4 && ros2 run controller_manager spawner diff_drive_controller
executable.name: ddc_spawner

executable.cmd: sleep 6 && ros2 run rviz2 rviz2 -d $(var rviz_config)
executable.name: rviz2
